title: FA3 — Interactive Tools

FA3 — Interactive Tools

Financial Accounting 3 · Amsterdam Business School · University of Amsterdam




📊


Bond Amortization Schedule


Build and explore effective-interest amortization tables for bonds issued at a premium or discount.




📐


DCF Timeline Generator


Visualize discounted cash flow timelines — map out coupon payments, principal, and present values.




⚠️


Impairment — Expected Credit Loss


Walk through the IFRS 9 expected credit loss model with interactive staging and calculations.
